creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Hi, sorry I didn't notice this until now. The patches are acceptable to me.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat

On 03/01/14 04:31, Guido Falsi wrote:
> Hi again,
>
> Attaching a revised patch which updates both scintilla and scite to
> version 3.3.9, and also converts both ports to support staging.
>
> Can you approve this patch?
>
> Please reply using "reply all" so your answer will be tracked by gnats.
>
> Thanks.
>
